member.name: T:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.AllowNullAttribute
member.summary: Specifies that null is allowed as an input even if the corresponding type disallows it.

member.name: T:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.DisallowNullAttribute
member.summary: Specifies that null is disallowed as an input even if the corresponding type allows it.

member.name: T:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.MaybeNullAttribute
member.summary: Specifies that an output may be null even if the corresponding type disallows it.

member.name: T:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.NotNullAttribute
member.summary: Specifies that an output will not be null even if the corresponding type allows it. Specifies that an input argument was not null when the call returns.

member.name: T:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.MaybeNullWhenAttribute
member.summary: Specifies that when a method returns , the parameter may be null even if the corresponding type disallows it.

member.name: M:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.MaybeNullWhenAttribute.#ctor(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Initializes the attribute with the specified return value condition.
member.param: The return value condition. If the method returns this value, the associated parameter may be .

member.name: P:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.MaybeNullWhenAttribute.ReturnValue
member.summary: Gets the return value condition.

member.name: T:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.NotNullWhenAttribute
member.summary: Specifies that when a method returns , the parameter will not be null even if the corresponding type allows it.

member.name: M:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.NotNullWhenAttribute.#ctor(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Initializes the attribute with the specified return value condition.
member.param: The return value condition. If the method returns this value, the associated parameter will not be .

member.name: P:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.NotNullWhenAttribute.ReturnValue
member.summary: Gets the return value condition.

member.name: T:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.NotNullIfNotNullAttribute
member.summary: Specifies that the output will be non-null if the named parameter is non-null.

member.name: M:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.NotNullIfNotNullAttribute.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes the attribute with the associated parameter name.
member.param: The associated parameter name. The output will be non-null if the argument to the parameter specified is non-null.

member.name: P:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.NotNullIfNotNullAttribute.ParameterName
member.summary: Gets the associated parameter name.

member.name: T:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.DoesNotReturnAttribute
member.summary: Applied to a method that will never return under any circumstance.

member.name: T:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.DoesNotReturnIfAttribute
member.summary: Specifies that the method will not return if the associated Boolean parameter is passed the specified value.

member.name: M:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.DoesNotReturnIfAttribute.#ctor(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Initializes the attribute with the specified parameter value.
member.param: The condition parameter value. Code after the method will be considered unreachable by diagnostics if the argument to the associated parameter matches this value.

member.name: P:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.DoesNotReturnIfAttribute.ParameterValue
member.summary: Gets the condition parameter value.

member.name: T:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.MemberNotNullAttribute
member.summary: Specifies that the method or property will ensure that the listed field and property members have not-null values.

member.name: M:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.MemberNotNullAttribute.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes the attribute with a field or property member.
member.param: The field or property member that is promised to be not-null.

member.name: M:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.MemberNotNullAttribute.#ctor(System.String[])
member.summary: Initializes the attribute with the list of field and property members.
member.param: The list of field and property members that are promised to be not-null.

member.name: P:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.MemberNotNullAttribute.Members
member.summary: Gets field or property member names.

member.name: T:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.MemberNotNullWhenAttribute
member.summary: Specifies that the method or property will ensure that the listed field and property members have not-null values when returning with the specified return value condition.

member.name: M:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.MemberNotNullWhenAttribute.#ctor(System.Boolean,System.String)
member.summary: Initializes the attribute with the specified return value condition and a field or property member.
member.param: The return value condition. If the method returns this value, the associated parameter will not be .
The field or property member that is promised to be not-null.

member.name: M:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.MemberNotNullWhenAttribute.#ctor(System.Boolean,System.String[])
member.summary: Initializes the attribute with the specified return value condition and list of field and property members.
member.param: The return value condition. If the method returns this value, the associated parameter will not be .
The list of field and property members that are promised to be not-null.

member.name: P:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.MemberNotNullWhenAttribute.ReturnValue
member.summary: Gets the return value condition.

member.name: P:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.MemberNotNullWhenAttribute.Members
member.summary: Gets field or property member names.

member.name: T:System.Runtime.CompilerServices.CallerArgumentExpressionAttribute
member.summary: Tags parameter that should be filled with specific caller name.

member.name: M:System.Runtime.CompilerServices.CallerArgumentExpressionAttribute.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: Function parameter to take the name from.

member.name: P:System.Runtime.CompilerServices.CallerArgumentExpressionAttribute.ParameterName
member.summary: Gets name of the function parameter that name should be taken from.

member.name: T:System.Runtime.CompilerServices.SkipLocalsInitAttribute
member.summary: Used to indicate to the compiler that the .locals init flag should not be set in method headers.
member.remarks: This attribute is unsafe because it may reveal uninitialized memory to the application in certain instances (e.g., reading from uninitialized stackalloc'd memory). If applied to a method directly, the attribute applies to that method and all nested functions (lambdas, local functions) below it. If applied to a type or module, it applies to all methods nested inside. This attribute is intentionally not permitted on assemblies. Use at the module level instead to apply to multiple type declarations.

member.name: T:System.Threading.Tasks.TaskExtensions
member.summary: Provides a set of static methods for .

member.name: M:System.Threading.Tasks.TaskExtensions.WaitAsync``1(System.Threading.Tasks.Task{``0},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets a that will complete when the completes or when the specified has cancellation requested.
member.typeparam: The type of the task result.
member.param: The task to wait on for completion.
The to monitor for a cancellation request.

member.name: T:System.Net.Http.HttpDiagnosticsHttpRequestMessageExtensions
member.summary: Extensions for telemetry utilities.

member.summary: Sets metadata for outgoing requests to be used for telemetry purposes.
member.param: object.
Metadata for the request.

member.name: M:System.Net.Http.HttpDiagnosticsHttpRequestMessageExtensions.GetRequestMetadata(System.Net.Http.HttpRequestMessage)
member.summary: Gets metadata for outgoing requests to be used for telemetry purposes.
member.param: object.

member.name: T:System.Net.HttpDiagnosticsHttpWebRequestExtensions
member.summary: Extensions for telemetry utilities.

member.name: M:System.Net.HttpDiagnosticsHttpWebRequestExtensions.SetRequestMetadata(System.Net.HttpWebRequest,Microsoft.Extensions.Http.Diagnostics.RequestMetadata)
member.summary: Sets metadata for outgoing requests to be used for telemetry purposes.
member.param: object.
Metadata for the request.

member.name: M:System.Net.HttpDiagnosticsHttpWebRequestExtensions.GetRequestMetadata(System.Net.HttpWebRequest)
member.summary: Gets metadata for outgoing requests to be used for telemetry purposes.
member.param: object.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Shared.Collections.Empty
member.summary: Defines static methods used to optimize the use of empty collections.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Shared.Collections.Empty.ReadOnlyCollection``1
member.summary: Returns an optimized empty collection.
member.returns: Returns an efficient static instance of an empty collection.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Shared.Collections.Empty.Enumerable``1
member.summary: Returns an optimized empty collection.
member.returns: Returns an efficient static instance of an empty collection.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Shared.Collections.Empty.ReadOnlyList``1
member.summary: Returns an optimized empty collection.
member.returns: Returns an efficient static instance of an empty list.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Shared.Collections.Empty.ReadOnlyDictionary``2
member.summary: Returns an optimized empty dictionary.
member.typeparam: The key type of the dictionary.
The value type of the dictionary.
member.returns: Returns an efficient static instance of an empty dictionary.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Shared.Collections.EmptyCollectionExtensions
member.summary: Defines static methods used to optimize the use of empty collections.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Shared.Collections.EmptyCollectionExtensions.EmptyIfNull``1(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyCollection{``0})
member.summary: Returns an optimized empty collection if the input is or empty, otherwise returns the input.
member.param: The collection to check for or empty.
member.returns: Returns a static instance of an empty type if the input collection is or empty, otherwise the collection.
member.remarks: Substituting a static collection whenever an empty collection is needed helps in two ways. First, it allows the original empty collection to be garbage collected, freeing memory. Second, the empty collection that is returned is optimized to not allocated memory whenever the collection is enumerated.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Shared.Collections.EmptyCollectionExtensions.EmptyIfNull``1(System.Collections.Generic.ICollection{``0})
member.summary: Returns an optimized empty collection if the input is or empty, otherwise returns the input.
member.param: The collection to check for or empty.
member.returns: Returns a static instance of an empty type if the input collection is or empty, otherwise the collection.
member.remarks: Substituting a static collection whenever an empty collection is needed helps in two ways. First, it allows the original empty collection to be garbage collected, freeing memory. Second, the empty collection that is returned is optimized to not allocated memory whenever the collection is enumerated.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Shared.Collections.EmptyCollectionExtensions.EmptyIfNull``1(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{``0})
member.summary: Returns an optimized empty collection if the input is or empty, otherwise returns the input.
member.param: The collection to check for or empty.
member.returns: Returns a static instance of an empty type if the input collection is or empty, otherwise the collection.
member.remarks: Substituting a static collection whenever an empty collection is needed helps in two ways. First, it allows the original empty collection to be garbage collected, freeing memory. Second, the empty collection that is returned is optimized to not allocated memory whenever the collection is enumerated.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Shared.Collections.EmptyCollectionExtensions.EmptyIfNull``1(System.Collections.Generic.IList{``0})
member.summary: Returns an optimized empty list if the input is or empty, otherwise returns the input.
member.param: The list to check for or empty.
member.returns: Returns a static instance of an empty type if the input collection is or empty, otherwise the collection.
member.remarks: Substituting a static list whenever an empty collection is needed helps in two ways. First, it allows the original empty collection to be garbage collected, freeing memory. Second, the empty collection that is returned is optimized to not allocated memory whenever the collection is enumerated.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Shared.Collections.EmptyCollectionExtensions.EmptyIfNull``1(``0[])
member.summary: Returns an optimized empty array if the input is or empty, otherwise returns the input.
member.param: The array to check for or empty.
member.returns: Returns a static instance of an empty array if the input array is or empty, otherwise the array.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Shared.Collections.EmptyCollectionExtensions.EmptyIfNull``1(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{``0})
member.summary: Returns an optimized empty collection if the input is or can be determined to be empty, otherwise returns the input.
member.param: The collection to check for or empty.
member.returns: Returns a static instance of an empty type if the input collection is or empty, otherwise the collection.
member.remarks: This method does not enumerate the collection.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Shared.Collections.EmptyCollectionExtensions.EmptyIfNull``2(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyDictionary{``0,``1})
member.summary: Returns an optimized empty dictionary if the input is or can be determined to be empty, otherwise returns the input.
member.typeparam: The key type of the dictionary.
The value type of the dictionary.
member.param: The dictionary to check for or empty.
member.returns: Returns a static instance of an empty type if the input dictionary is or empty, otherwise the dictionary.
member.remarks: Note that this method does not enumerate the dictionary.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Shared.Text.NumericExtensions
member.summary: Utilities to augment the basic numeric types.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Shared.Text.NumericExtensions.ToInvariantString(System.Int32)
member.summary: Formats an integer as an invariant string.
member.param: The value to format as a string.
member.returns: The string representation of the integer value.
member.remarks: This works identically to value.ToString(CultureInfo.InvariantCulture) except that it is faster as it maintains preformatted strings for common integer values.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Shared.Text.NumericExtensions.ToInvariantString(System.Int64)
member.summary: Formats a 64-bit integer as an invariant string.
member.param: The value to format as a string.
member.returns: The string representation of the integer value.
member.remarks: This works identically to value.ToString(CultureInfo.InvariantCulture) except that it is faster as it maintains preformatted strings for common integer values.

member.summary: Registers system debugger as interface.

member.summary: Gets cached instance of .

member.summary: Abstracts debugger presence to increase testability.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Shared.Diagnostics.IDebuggerState.IsAttached
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether a debugger is attached or not.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Shared.Diagnostics.SystemDebugger
member.summary: Debugger with environment dependent state.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Shared.Diagnostics.SystemDebugger.Instance
member.summary: Gets cached instance of .

member.name: T:Microsoft.Shared.Pools.BufferWriter`1
member.summary: Represents an output sink into which data can be written.
member.remarks: This class is similar to System.Buffers.ArrayBufferWriter<T>, with the exception that the ArrayBufferWriter<T>.Clear method has been replaced with a method. When used with value types, doesn't clear the underlying memory buffer to default(T), which makes it considerably faster. Additionally, this class lets you explicitly set the capacity of the underlying buffer.
member.typeparam: The type of value that will be written into the writer.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Shared.Pools.BufferWriter`1.WrittenMemory
member.summary: Gets the data written to the underlying buffer so far.
member.remarks: The returned value can become stale whenever the buffer is written to again. As such, you should always call this property in order to get a fresh value before reading from the buffer.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Shared.Pools.BufferWriter`1.WrittenSpan
member.summary: Gets the data written to the underlying buffer so far.
member.remarks: The returned span can become stale whenever the buffer is written to again. As such, you should always call this property in order to get a fresh span before reading from the buffer.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Shared.Pools.BufferWriter`1.WrittenCount
member.summary: Gets the amount of data written to the underlying buffer so far.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Shared.Pools.BufferWriter`1.Capacity
member.summary: Gets or sets the total amount of space within the underlying buffer.
member.remarks: When reducing the capacity, the value of is clamped to the new capacity.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Shared.Pools.BufferWriter`1.Reset
member.summary: Clears the data written to the underlying buffer.
member.remarks: You must reset the before trying to re-use it. If is or contains reference types, than this method will clear the underlying memory buffers to default(T) in order to ensure the GC is able to reclaim references correctly. If is a value type and only contains value types, then this method doesn't clear memory and so completes considerably faster.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Shared.Pools.BufferWriter`1.Advance(System.Int32)
member.summary: Notifies that amount of data was written to the output /.
member.param: The amount of data that has been consumed.
member.exception: Thrown when is negative or when attempting to advance past the end of the underlying buffer.
member.remarks: You must request a new buffer after calling to continue writing more data and cannot write to a previously acquired buffer.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Shared.Pools.BufferWriter`1.GetMemory(System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns a to write to that is at least the requested length (specified by ).
member.remarks: This will never return an empty . There is no guarantee that successive calls will return the same buffer or the same-sized buffer. You must request a new buffer after calling to continue writing more data and cannot write to a previously acquired buffer.
member.param: THe minimum size of the returned buffer. If this is 0, returns a buffer with at least 1 byte available.
member.returns: A block of memory that can be written to.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Shared.Pools.BufferWriter`1.GetSpan(System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns a to write to that is at least the requested length (specified by ).
member.remarks: This will never return an empty . There is no guarantee that successive calls will return the same buffer or the same-sized buffer. You must request a new buffer after calling to continue writing more data and cannot write to a previously acquired buffer.
member.param: THe minimum size of the returned buffer. If this is 0, returns a buffer with at least 1 byte available.
member.returns: A block of memory that can be written to.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Shared.Pools.BufferWriterPool.CreateBufferWriterPool``1(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Creates an object pool of instances.
member.typeparam: The type of object managed by the buffer writers.
member.param: The maximum number of items to keep in the pool. This defaults to 1024. This value is a recommendation, the pool may keep more objects than this.
The maximum capacity of the buffer writers to keep in the pool. This defaults to 256K.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Shared.Pools.BufferWriterPool.SharedBufferWriterPool
member.summary: Gets the shared pool of instances.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Shared.Pools.BufferWriterPooledObjectPolicy`1
member.summary: An object pooling policy designed for .
member.typeparam: The type of objects to hold in the buffer writer.

member.name: F:Microsoft.Shared.Pools.BufferWriterPooledObjectPolicy`1.DefaultMaximumRetainedCapacity
member.summary: Default maximum retained capacity of buffer writer instances in the pool.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Shared.Pools.BufferWriterPooledObjectPolicy`1.#ctor(System.Int32)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The maximum capacity of to keep in the pool. If an object is returned to the pool whose capacity exceeds this number, the object instance is not added to the pool, and thus becomes eligible for garbage collection.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Shared.Pools.BufferWriterPooledObjectPolicy`1.MaximumRetainedCapacity
member.summary: Gets the maximum capacity of to keep in the pool.
member.remarks: If an object is returned to the pool whose capacity exceeds this number, the object instance is not added to the pool, and thus becomes eligible for garbage collection. Default maximum retained capacity is 256 * 1024 bytes.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Shared.Pools.BufferWriterPooledObjectPolicy`1.Create
member.summary: Creates an instance of .

member.name: M:Microsoft.Shared.Pools.BufferWriterPooledObjectPolicy`1.Return(Microsoft.Shared.Pools.BufferWriter{`0})
member.summary: Performs any work needed before returning an object to a pool.
member.param: The object to return to a pool.
member.returns: true if the object should be returned to the pool, false if it shouldn't.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Shared.Pools.ReturnableBufferWriter`1
member.summary: Represents a buffer writer that can be automatically returned to an object pool upon dispose.
member.typeparam: The type of the elements in the buffer.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Shared.Pools.ReturnableBufferWriter`1.#ctor(Microsoft.Extensions.ObjectPool.ObjectPool{Microsoft.Shared.Pools.BufferWriter{`0}})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the struct.
member.param: The object pool to return the buffer writer to.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Shared.Pools.ReturnableBufferWriter`1.Buffer
member.summary: Gets the buffer writer.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Shared.Pools.ReturnableBufferWriter`1.Dispose
member.summary: Disposes the buffer writer and returns it to the object pool.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Extensions.Http.Diagnostics.Constants
member.summary: Common telemetry constants used by various telemetry libraries.

member.name: F:Microsoft.Extensions.Http.Diagnostics.Constants.HttpWebConstants.RequestRouteHeader
member.summary: Request Route HTTP Header key.

member.name: F:Microsoft.Extensions.Http.Diagnostics.Constants.HttpWebConstants.RequestNameHeader
member.summary: Request Name HTTP Header key.

member.name: F:Microsoft.Extensions.Http.Diagnostics.Constants.HttpWebConstants.DependencyNameHeader
member.summary: Dependency Name HTTP Header key.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Extensions.Http.Diagnostics.DefaultHttpDependencyMetadataResolver
member.summary: Default implementation of that uses the base trie-based lookup algorithm.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Http.Diagnostics.DefaultHttpDependencyMetadataResolver.#ctor(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{Microsoft.Extensions.Http.Diagnostics.IDownstreamDependencyMetadata})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: A collection of HTTP dependency metadata used for request resolution.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Extensions.Http.Diagnostics.HttpDependencyMetadataResolver
member.summary: Resolves metadata for HTTP requests based on hostname, path, and method patterns.
member.remarks: This class provides a high-performance way to identify HTTP requests by mapping them to previously configured metadata using specialized trie-based data structures. This enables efficient lookup of service information, operation names, and other metadata for telemetry and policy application.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Http.Diagnostics.HttpDependencyMetadataResolver.#ctor(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{Microsoft.Extensions.Http.Diagnostics.IDownstreamDependencyMetadata})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: A collection of HTTP dependency metadata used for request resolution.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Http.Diagnostics.HttpDependencyMetadataResolver.GetRequestMetadata(System.Net.Http.HttpRequestMessage)
member.summary: Gets request metadata for the specified instance of .
member.param: The HTTP request message.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Extensions.Http.Latency.HttpClientLatencyTelemetryOptions
member.summary: Options to configure the http client latency telemetry.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.Http.Latency.HttpClientLatencyTelemetryOptions.EnableDetailedLatencyBreakdown
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether to collect detailed latency breakdown of call.
member.remarks: Detailed breakdowns add checkpoints for HTTP operations, such as connection open and request headers sent.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Extensions.Http.Latency.Internal.HttpClientLatencyLogEnricher
member.summary: The enricher appends checkpoints for the outgoing http request. It also logs the server name from the response header to correlate logs between client and server.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Extensions.Http.Latency.Internal.HttpLatencyTelemetryHandler
member.summary: This delegating handler creates a for the request if it has not been created for the request. It also adds client name to outgoing request header which helps with correlating client and server telemetry.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Extensions.Http.Logging.HttpClientLoggingTagNames
member.summary: Constants used for HTTP client logging tags.

member.name: F:Microsoft.Extensions.Http.Logging.HttpClientLoggingTagNames.Duration
member.summary: HTTP Request duration.

member.name: F:Microsoft.Extensions.Http.Logging.HttpClientLoggingTagNames.Host
member.summary: HTTP Host.

member.name: F:Microsoft.Extensions.Http.Logging.HttpClientLoggingTagNames.Method
member.summary: HTTP Method.

member.name: F:Microsoft.Extensions.Http.Logging.HttpClientLoggingTagNames.Path
member.summary: HTTP Path.

member.name: F:Microsoft.Extensions.Http.Logging.HttpClientLoggingTagNames.RequestBody
member.summary: HTTP Request Body.

member.name: F:Microsoft.Extensions.Http.Logging.HttpClientLoggingTagNames.ResponseBody
member.summary: HTTP Response Body.

member.name: F:Microsoft.Extensions.Http.Logging.HttpClientLoggingTagNames.RequestHeaderPrefix
member.summary: HTTP Request Headers prefix.

member.name: F:Microsoft.Extensions.Http.Logging.HttpClientLoggingTagNames.ResponseHeaderPrefix
member.summary: HTTP Response Headers prefix.

member.name: F:Microsoft.Extensions.Http.Logging.HttpClientLoggingTagNames.UrlQuery
member.summary: URL query parameters prefix.

member.name: F:Microsoft.Extensions.Http.Logging.HttpClientLoggingTagNames.StatusCode
member.summary: HTTP Status Code.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.Http.Logging.HttpClientLoggingTagNames.TagNames
member.summary: Gets a list of all tag names.
member.returns: A read-only of all tag names.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Extensions.Http.Logging.IHttpClientLogEnricher
member.summary: Interface for implementing log enrichers for HTTP client requests.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Http.Logging.IHttpClientLogEnricher.Enrich(Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.Enrichment.IEnrichmentTagCollector,System.Net.Http.HttpRequestMessage,System.Net.Http.HttpResponseMessage,System.Exception)
member.summary: Enrich HTTP client request logs.
member.param: Tag collector to add tags to.
object associated with the outgoing HTTP request.
object associated with the outgoing HTTP request.
An optional that was thrown within the outgoing HTTP request processing.
member.remarks: Depending on the result of the HTTP request, the and parameters might be .

member.summary: Exposed for testing purposes.

member.summary: Exposed for testing purposes.

member.summary: Read HTTP request headers.
member.param: An instance of to read headers from.
Destination to save read headers to.

member.summary: Read HTTP response headers.
member.param: An instance of to read headers from.
Destination to save read headers to.

member.summary: Redact values by using a .

An instance of to redact a value.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Extensions.Http.Logging.Internal.IHttpRequestReader
member.summary: Methods to read or .
Reads .
member.param: A log record object to fill in.
HTTP response.
A buffer to read response headers to.
A cancellation token to cancel operation.
member.returns: A task representing an async operation.

member.summary: Reads .
member.param: A log record object to fill in.
HTTP request.
A buffer to read request headers to.
A cancellation token to cancel operation.
member.returns: A task representing an async operation.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Extensions.Http.Logging.Internal.Log
member.summary: Logs , and the exceptions due to errors of request/response.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Http.Logging.Internal.Log.RequestReadError(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger,System.Exception,System.Net.Http.HttpMethod,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Logs "An error occurred while reading the request data to fill the logger context for request: {http.request.method} {server.address}/{url.path}" at "Error" level.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Http.Logging.Internal.Log.ResponseReadError(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger,System.Exception,System.Net.Http.HttpMethod,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Logs "An error occurred while reading the response data to fill the logger context for request: {http.request.method} {server.address}/{url.path}" at "Error" level.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Http.Logging.Internal.Log.LoggerContextMissing(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger,System.Exception,System.String,System.Net.Http.HttpMethod,System.String)
member.summary: Logs "The logger couldn't read its context for {RequestState} request: {http.request.method} {server.address}" at "Error" level.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Http.Logging.Internal.Log.EnrichmentError(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger,System.Exception,System.String,System.Net.Http.HttpMethod,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Logs "An error occurred in enricher '{Enricher}' while enriching the logger context for request: {http.request.method} {server.address}/{url.path}" at "Error" level.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Http.Logging.Internal.LoggerMessageStateExtensions.AddRequestHeaders(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.LoggerMessageState,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Collections.Generic.KeyValuePair{System.String,System.String}},System.Int32@)
member.summary: Adds request headers to .
member.param: A to be filled.
A list with request headers.
Represents an index to be used when writing tags into .
member.remarks: will be mutated to point to the next item.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Http.Logging.Internal.LoggerMessageStateExtensions.AddResponseHeaders(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.LoggerMessageState,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Collections.Generic.KeyValuePair{System.String,System.String}},System.Int32@)
member.summary: Adds response headers to .
member.param: A to be filled.
A list with response headers.
Represents an index to be used when writing tags into .
member.remarks: will be mutated to point to the next item.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Http.Logging.Internal.LoggerMessageStateExtensions.AddPathParameters(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.LoggerMessageState,Microsoft.Extensions.Http.Diagnostics.HttpRouteParameter[],System.Int32,System.Int32@)
member.summary: Adds path parameters to .
member.param: A to be filled.
An array with path parameters.
A number of path parameters.
Represents an index to be used when writing tags into .
member.remarks: will be mutated to point to the next item.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Http.Logging.Internal.LoggingOptionsValidator.Validate(System.String,Microsoft.Extensions.Http.Logging.LoggingOptions)
member.summary: Validates a specific named options instance (or all when is ).
member.param: The name of the options instance being validated.
The options instance.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Extensions.Http.Logging.Internal.LogRecord
member.summary: Parsed HTTP information.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.Http.Logging.Internal.LogRecord.Host
member.summary: Gets or sets HTTP host.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.Http.Logging.Internal.LogRecord.Method
member.summary: Gets or sets HTTP request method.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.Http.Logging.Internal.LogRecord.Path
member.summary: Gets or sets parsed request path.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.Http.Logging.Internal.LogRecord.Duration
member.summary: Gets or sets HTTP request duration in milliseconds.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.Http.Logging.Internal.LogRecord.StatusCode
member.summary: Gets or sets HTTP response status code.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.Http.Logging.Internal.LogRecord.RequestHeaders
member.summary: Gets or sets parsed list of request headers.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.Http.Logging.Internal.LogRecord.ResponseHeaders
member.summary: Gets or sets parsed list of headers.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.Http.Logging.Internal.LogRecord.RequestBody
member.summary: Gets or sets parsed request body.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.Http.Logging.Internal.LogRecord.ResponseBody
member.summary: Gets or sets parsed response body.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.Http.Logging.Internal.LogRecord.EnrichmentTags
member.summary: Gets or sets enrichment properties.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.Http.Logging.Internal.LogRecord.PathParameters
member.summary: Gets or sets request path parameters.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.Http.Logging.Internal.LogRecord.PathParametersCount
member.summary: Gets or sets request path parameters count for .

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.Http.Logging.Internal.LogRecord.QueryString
member.summary: Gets or sets formatted query parameters.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Http.Logging.Internal.OptionsExtensions.GetKeyedOrCurrent``1(Microsoft.Extensions.Options.IOptionsMonitor{``0},System.String)
member.summary: Gets the options for the given service key, or the current value if the service key is .
member.param: The to load the options object from.
An optional string that specifies the name of the options object to get.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Http.Logging.Internal.ServiceProviderExtensions.GetRequiredOrKeyedRequiredService``1(System.IServiceProvider,System.String)
member.summary: Gets a keyed service from the , or a non-keyed service if the key is .
member.typeparam: The type of service object to get.
member.param: The to retrieve the service object from.
An optional string that specifies the key of service object to get.
member.exception: There is no service of type registered.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Extensions.Http.Logging.LoggingOptions
member.summary: Options to configure HTTP client requests logging.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.Http.Logging.LoggingOptions.LogRequestStart
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the request is logged additionally before any further processing.
member.remarks: When enabled, two entries will be logged for each incoming request - one for request and one for response, if available. When disabled, only one entry will be logged for each incoming request, which includes both request and response data.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.Http.Logging.LoggingOptions.RequestQueryParametersDataClasses
member.summary: Gets or sets the set of HTTP request query parameters to log and their respective data classifications to use for redaction.
member.remarks: If empty, no HTTP request query parameters will be logged. If the data class is , no redaction will be done.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.Http.Logging.LoggingOptions.LogBody
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the HTTP request and response body are logged.
member.remarks: Avoid enabling this option in a production environment as it might lead to leaking privacy information.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.Http.Logging.LoggingOptions.BodySizeLimit
member.summary: Gets or sets the maximum number of bytes of the request or response body to read.
member.remarks: The number should ideally be below 85000 bytes to not be allocated on the large object heap.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.Http.Logging.LoggingOptions.BodyReadTimeout
member.summary: Gets or sets the maximum amount of time to wait for the request or response body to be read.
member.remarks: The value should be in the range of 1 millisecond to 1 minute.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.Http.Logging.LoggingOptions.RequestBodyContentTypes
member.summary: Gets or sets the list of HTTP request content types which are considered text and thus possible to serialize.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.Http.Logging.LoggingOptions.ResponseBodyContentTypes
member.summary: Gets or sets the list of HTTP response content types which are considered text and thus possible to serialize.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.Http.Logging.LoggingOptions.RequestHeadersDataClasses
member.summary: Gets or sets the set of HTTP request headers to log and their respective data classifications to use for redaction.
member.remarks: If empty, no HTTP request headers will be logged. If the data class is , no redaction will be done.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.Http.Logging.LoggingOptions.ResponseHeadersDataClasses
member.summary: Gets or sets the set of HTTP response headers to log and their respective data classifications to use for redaction.
member.remarks: If the data class is , no redaction will be done. If empty, no HTTP response headers will be logged.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.Http.Logging.LoggingOptions.RequestPathLoggingMode
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating how the outgoing HTTP request path should be logged.
member.remarks: This option is applied only when the option is not set to , otherwise this setting is ignored and the non-redacted HTTP request path is logged.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.Http.Logging.LoggingOptions.RequestPathParameterRedactionMode
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating how outgoing HTTP request path parameters should be redacted.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.Http.Logging.LoggingOptions.RouteParameterDataClasses
member.summary: Gets or sets the route parameters to redact with their corresponding data classifications to apply appropriate redaction.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.Http.Logging.LoggingOptions.LogContentHeaders
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the HTTP request and response content headers are logged.
member.remarks: This property controls whether the logging of HTTP request and response representation headers (e.g. Content-Type) is enabled. Keep this option disabled if or don't contain any representation headers, otherwise it will create unnecessary minor performance impact on the headers logging.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Extensions.Http.Logging.OutgoingPathLoggingMode
member.summary: Strategy to decide how outgoing HTTP path is logged.

member.name: F:Microsoft.Extensions.Http.Logging.OutgoingPathLoggingMode.Formatted
member.summary: HTTP path is formatted, for example in a form of /foo/bar/redactedUserId.

member.name: F:Microsoft.Extensions.Http.Logging.OutgoingPathLoggingMode.Structured
member.summary: HTTP path is not formatted, route parameters logged in curly braces, for example in a form of /foo/bar/{userId}.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.HttpDiagnosticsServiceCollectionExtensions
member.summary: Extensions for telemetry utilities.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.HttpDiagnosticsServiceCollectionExtensions.AddDownstreamDependencyMetadata(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,Microsoft.Extensions.Http.Diagnostics.IDownstreamDependencyMetadata)
member.summary: Adds dependency metadata.
member.param: object instance.
DownstreamDependencyMetadata object to add.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.HttpDiagnosticsServiceCollectionExtensions.AddDownstreamDependencyMetadata``1(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection)
member.summary: Adds dependency metadata.
member.param: object instance.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.HttpClientLatencyTelemetryExtensions
member.summary: Extensions to add http client latency telemetry.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.HttpClientLatencyTelemetryExtensions.AddHttpClientLatencyTelemetry(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection)
member.summary: Adds a to collect latency information and enrich outgoing request log for all http clients.
member.remarks: This extension configures latency information collection globally for all http clients.
member.param: The .

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.HttpClientLatencyTelemetryExtensions.AddHttpClientLatencyTelemetry(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfigurationSection)
member.summary: Adds a to collect latency information and enrich outgoing request log for all http clients.
member.remarks: This extension configures outgoing request logs auto collection globally for all http clients.
member.param: The .
The to use for configuring .

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.HttpClientLatencyTelemetryExtensions.AddHttpClientLatencyTelemetry(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,System.Action{Microsoft.Extensions.Http.Latency.HttpClientLatencyTelemetryOptions})
member.summary: Adds a to collect latency information and enrich outgoing request log for all http clients.
member.remarks: This extension configures outgoing request logs auto collection globally for all http clients.
member.param: The .
The delegate to configure with.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.HttpClientLoggingHttpClientBuilderExtensions
member.summary: Extensions to register extended HTTP client logging features.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.HttpClientLoggingHttpClientBuilderExtensions.AddExtendedHttpClientLogging(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IHttpClientBuilder)
member.summary: Adds an to emit logs for outgoing requests for a named .
member.param: The .
member.remarks: All other loggers are removed - including the default one, registered via . Information logged by this method is added as key/value pairs to log state.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.HttpClientLoggingHttpClientBuilderExtensions.AddExtendedHttpClientLogging(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IHttpClientBuilder,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Adds an to emit logs for outgoing requests for a named .
member.param: The .
When , the logger is placed at the beginning of the request pipeline, wrapping all other handlers. When , the logger is placed at the end of the pipeline, right before the primary message handler.
member.remarks: All other loggers are removed - including the default one, registered via . Information logged by this method is added as key/value pairs to log state.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.HttpClientLoggingHttpClientBuilderExtensions.AddExtendedHttpClientLogging(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IHttpClientBuilder,Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfigurationSection)
member.summary: Adds an to emit logs for outgoing requests for a named .
member.param: The .
The to use for configuring .
member.remarks: All other loggers are removed - including the default one, registered via . Information logged by this method is added as key/value pairs to log state.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.HttpClientLoggingHttpClientBuilderExtensions.AddExtendedHttpClientLogging(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IHttpClientBuilder,Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfigurationSection,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Adds an to emit logs for outgoing requests for a named .
member.param: The .
The to use for configuring .
When , the logger is placed at the beginning of the request pipeline, wrapping all other handlers. When , the logger is placed at the end of the pipeline, right before the primary message handler.
member.remarks: All other loggers are removed - including the default one, registered via . Information logged by this method is added as key/value pairs to log state.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.HttpClientLoggingHttpClientBuilderExtensions.AddExtendedHttpClientLogging(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IHttpClientBuilder,System.Action{Microsoft.Extensions.Http.Logging.LoggingOptions})
member.summary: Adds an to emit logs for outgoing requests for a named .
member.param: The .
The delegate to configure with.
member.remarks: All other loggers are removed - including the default one, registered via . Information logged by this method is added as key/value pairs to log state.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.HttpClientLoggingHttpClientBuilderExtensions.AddExtendedHttpClientLogging(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IHttpClientBuilder,System.Action{Microsoft.Extensions.Http.Logging.LoggingOptions},System.Boolean)
member.summary: Adds an to emit logs for outgoing requests for a named .
member.param: The .
The delegate to configure with.
When , the logger is placed at the beginning of the request pipeline, wrapping all other handlers. When , the logger is placed at the end of the pipeline, right before the primary message handler.
member.remarks: All other loggers are removed - including the default one, registered via . Information logged by this method is added as key/value pairs to log state.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.HttpClientLoggingServiceCollectionExtensions
member.summary: Extensions to register extended HTTP client logging features.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.HttpClientLoggingServiceCollectionExtensions.AddExtendedHttpClientLogging(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection)
member.summary: Adds an to emit logs for outgoing requests for all HTTP clients created with .

member.remarks: All other loggers are removed - including the default one, registered via .

member.summary: Adds an enricher instance of to the to enrich logs.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Extensions.Telemetry.Internal.IHttpHeadersRedactor
member.summary: HTTP headers redactor.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Telemetry.Internal.IHttpHeadersRedactor.Redact(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.String},Microsoft.Extensions.Compliance.Classification.DataClassification)
member.summary: Redacts HTTP header values and joins the results into a .
member.param: HTTP header values.
Data classification which is used to get an appropriate redactor to redact headers.
member.returns: Returns text and parameter segments of route.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Telemetry.Internal.IHttpHeadersRedactor.Redact(System.String,Microsoft.Extensions.Compliance.Classification.DataClassification)
member.summary: Redacts HTTP header value which results into a .
member.param: HTTP header value.
Data classification which is used to get an appropriate redactor to redact header.
member.returns: Returns text and parameter segments of route.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.Binder.SourceGeneration.BindingExtensions.ValidateConfigurationKeys(System.Type,System.Lazy{System.Collections.Generic.HashSet{System.String}},Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfiguration,Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.BinderOptions)
member.summary: If required by the binder options, validates that there are no unknown keys in the input configuration object.
